creator: scott.nolde@gmail.com
text:
I did use gpsd from ports.

This "conflict" between ntpd and gpsd comes after upgrading from 6.x to
7.2-stable.  Both gpsd and ntpd were upgraded.  Backporting ntpd as much as
I could did not yield different results.  Efforts to backport gpsd didn't
work since gpsd-2.38 didn't like a library or something in the new 7.2
world.

- Scott
